checklist.disclosure_item: Has the balance sheet been prepared in account form (Kontoform) per §266 Abs. 1 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify the balance sheet is presented in two-column account form with Aktiva and Passiva.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are all four mandatory Aktiva balance sheet categories presented per §266 Abs. 2 HGB (Anlagevermögen, Umlaufvermögen, Rechnungsabgrenzungsposten, Aktiver Unterschiedsbetrag aus der Vermögensrechnung)?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check that all four mandatory Aktiva categories are present on the assets side of the balance sheet per §266 Abs. 2.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are all mandatory Passiva balance sheet categories presented per §266 Abs. 3 HGB (Eigenkapital, Rückstellungen, Verbindlichkeiten, Rechnungsabgrenzungsposten, Passive latente Steuern)?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check that all five mandatory Passiva categories are present on the liabilities side of the balance sheet.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the balance sheet presentation been maintained consistently with the prior year (Grundsatz der Darstellungsstetigkeit)?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Compare current and prior year balance sheet formats to confirm consistency of presentation.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the composition and changes in fixed assets (Anlagenspiegel) per §268 Abs. 2 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify an Anlagenspiegel (fixed asset movement schedule) showing opening balances, additions, disposals, and depreciation for each class is included in the notes.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the composition of current assets (Vorräte, Forderungen, Wertpapiere, Kassenbestand, Guthaben bei Kreditinstituten)?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check that current assets are broken down into the mandatory sub-categories per §266 Abs. 2 B.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed its share capital (Stammkapital) per §266 Abs. 3 A.I.1 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Stammkapital is shown as a separate line item under Gezeichnetes Kapital in the equity section.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed capital reserves (Kapitalrücklage) per §266 Abs. 3 A.II.1 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if capital reserves exist
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check whether the entity has capital reserves and, if so, that they are disclosed as a separate line item.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed retained earnings (Gewinnrücklagen) per §266 Abs. 3 A.III HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if retained earnings exist
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check whether retained earnings exist and if so verify they are broken down into sub-categories per §266 Abs. 3 A.III HGB, including legal reserves, statutory reserves, and other revenue reserves where applicable.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the composition of provisions (Rückstellungen) by type per §266 Abs. 3 B HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that provisions are broken down into Pensionen, Steuern, and Sonstige Rückstellungen as separate line items.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the total amount of pension provisions per §285 Nr. 24 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if pension provisions exist
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check whether pension provisions (Pensionsrückstellungen) exist and if so, that the total amount is disclosed in the notes.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed liabilities with a remaining maturity of more than five years per §285 Nr. 1a HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if liabilities with remaining maturity >5 years exist
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check the Verbindlichkeiten schedule for any long-term liabilities exceeding five years and verify disclosure.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the total amount of secured liabilities, stating the nature and form of the security per §285 Nr. 1b HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if liabilities secured by pledges or similar rights exist
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check for any secured liabilities (Pfandrechte) and verify that the nature and form of the security is disclosed.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the breakdown of liabilities per §285 Nr. 2 HGB by each balance sheet line item?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the notes provide a breakdown of long-term and short-term liabilities for each Verbindlichkeiten line item.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed deferred tax assets and/or liabilities per §274 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if temporary differences or loss carry-forwards give rise to deferred taxes
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check whether deferred tax items exist and whether they are separately disclosed as Aktive/Passive latente Steuern in the balance sheet.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the amortisation period for acquired goodwill per §285 Nr. 13 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if an acquired goodwill (entgeltlich erworbener Geschäfts- oder Firmenwert) exists
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check whether goodwill is present on the balance sheet and if so, that the amortisation period is disclosed in the notes.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed contingent liabilities (Haftungsverhältnisse) per §268 Abs. 7 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if contingent liabilities exist (guarantees, bills of exchange liabilities, etc.)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check for any guarantees, aval obligations, or other Haftungsverhältnisse and verify disclosure in the notes.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed receivables with a remaining term of more than one year per §268 Abs. 4 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if receivables with remaining term >1 year exist
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check whether any receivables have a term exceeding one year and verify they are separately disclosed.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed equity-method investments (Beteiligungen) per §266 Abs. 3 A.IV.2 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if equity-method investments exist
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check whether the entity holds Beteiligungen under Finanzanlagen and verify they are separately disclosed.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed receivables from shareholders (Forderungen gegen Gesellschafter) per §266 Abs. 3 C.I.4 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if receivables from shareholders exist
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check whether the entity has any receivables from its shareholders and verify separate disclosure.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the P&L been prepared in Staffelform (step format) per § 275 Abs. 1 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm that the GuV is presented in Staffelform (step format) and not in Kontoform (account form), as required for a medium-sized Kapitalgesellschaft.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the P&L used the Gesamtkostenverfahren (total cost method) as its classification basis?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the GuV follows the Gesamtkostenverfahren structure with cost-type classification rather than the Umsatzkostenverfahren (§ 275 Abs. 3 HGB).

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the P&L present the mandatory line item 'Umsatzerlöse' per § 275 Abs. 2 Nr. 1 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm that 'Umsatzerlöse' appears as a distinct line item in the GuV.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the P&L present the mandatory line item 'Erhöhung oder Verminderung des Bestands an fertigen und unfertigen Erzeugnissen' per § 275 Abs. 2 Nr. 2 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if there is a change in inventory of finished or unfinished goods during the reporting period.
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm that the line item for stock changes is presented, or that its absence is justified by no inventory movements.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the P&L present the mandatory line item 'Andere aktivierte Eigenleistungen' per § 275 Abs. 2 Nr. 3 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if the entity has capitalised internally generated assets during the reporting period.
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm that 'Andere aktivierte Eigenleistungen' is shown if internally generated intangible or tangible assets were capitalised, or note zero / not applicable.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the P&L present the mandatory line item 'Sonstige betriebliche Erträge' per § 275 Abs. 2 Nr. 4 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm that 'Sonstige betriebliche Erträge' appears as a distinct line item in the GuV.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the P&L present the mandatory line item 'Materialaufwand' per § 275 Abs. 2 Nr. 5 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm that 'Materialaufwand' appears as a distinct line item in the GuV.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the P&L present the mandatory line item 'Personalaufwand' per § 275 Abs. 2 Nr. 6 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm that 'Personalaufwand' appears as a distinct line item in the GuV.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the P&L present the mandatory line item 'Abschreibungen' per § 275 Abs. 2 Nr. 7 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm that 'Abschreibungen' appears as a distinct line item in the GuV.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the P&L present the mandatory line item 'Sonstige betriebliche Aufwendungen' per § 275 Abs. 2 Nr. 8 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm that 'Sonstige betriebliche Aufwendungen' appears as a distinct line item in the GuV.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the P&L present the mandatory line items for financial income: 'Erträge aus Beteiligungen', 'Erträge aus anderen Wertpapieren und Ausleihungen des Finanzanlagevermögens', and 'Sonstige Zinsen und ähnliche Erträge' per § 275 Abs. 2 Nr. 9–11 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm that all three financial income line items (Nr. 9, 10, 11) are individually presented in the GuV, even if their amounts are nil.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the P&L present the mandatory line items 'Abschreibungen auf Finanzanlagen und auf Wertpapiere des Umlaufvermögens' and 'Zinsen und ähnliche Aufwendungen' per § 275 Abs. 2 Nr. 12–13 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm that both financial expense line items (Nr. 12 and 13) are individually presented in the GuV, even if their amounts are nil.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the P&L present the mandatory line items 'Steuern vom Einkommen und vom Ertrag', 'Ergebnis nach Steuern', 'Sonstige Steuern', and 'Jahresüberschuss/Jahresfehlbetrag' per § 275 Abs. 2 Nr. 14–17 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm that all four bottom-section line items (Nr. 14–17) are individually presented in the GuV, culminating in the Jahresüberschuss or Jahresfehlbetrag.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed a breakdown of Umsatzerlöse by type of activity and by geographical markets per §285 Nr. 4 HGB, or has it invoked the §288 Abs. 2 exemption for medium-sized entities?
checklist.trigger_condition: Does not apply if the medium-sized entity invokes §288 Abs. 2 HGB to omit revenue breakdown
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check the Anhang for a revenue breakdown by activity and geography. If absent, verify whether the entity has invoked the §288 Abs. 2 exemption (medium GmbH may omit §285 Nr. 4). Confirm the exemption is justified by the entity circumstances.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the average number of employees during the financial year in the notes per § 285 Nr. 7 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Anhang states the average headcount during the reporting period, broken down by employee category if applicable.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the amount of Materialaufwand and Personalaufwand in the notes, with sub-classifications, per § 285 Nr. 8 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm that the Anhang provides a breakdown of material costs (e.g. raw materials, merchandise) and personnel costs (e.g. wages, social security, pensions) as required under Gesamtkostenverfahren.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the amount and nature of außerordentliche Erträge or außerordentliche Aufwendungen in the notes if any were recognised?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if the entity has recognised extraordinary income or expenses during the reporting period.
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check whether any items were classified as außerordentlich in the GuV; if so, verify that the Anhang discloses their nature and amount per § 285 Nr. 31 HGB.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed whether it has capitalised internally generated intangible assets (Selbstgeschaffene immaterielle Vermögensgegenstände), including the amount and the research and development costs incurred, per § 248 Abs. 2 and § 285 Nr. 22 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if the entity has capitalised internally generated intangible assets during the reporting period.
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify whether capitalised development costs appear on the balance sheet; if so, confirm that the Anhang discloses the amount of capitalised costs, total R&D expenditure, and the reasons for capitalisation.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the depreciation and amortisation methods used and the amounts of depreciation/amortisation by asset class in the notes per § 285 Nr. 6 and § 284 Abs. 2 Nr. 3 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm that the Anhang describes the depreciation/amortisation methods applied (straight-line, declining balance, etc.) and provides the amount of depreciation for each class of fixed assets.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the Lagebericht been prepared in accordance with § 289 Abs. 1 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that a Lagebericht has been prepared and is included in the annual financial statements for the financial year ending 31 December 2023.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the Lagebericht provide a true and fair view (den tatsächlichen Verhältnissen entsprechendes Bild) of the entity's business performance and financial position?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Read the Lagebericht and assess whether the overall presentation gives a balanced, fair, and comprehensive picture of the entity's situation.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the Lagebericht contain a balanced and comprehensive analysis of the business performance and the economic position of the entity (Geschäftsverlauf und Lage)?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check that the Lagebericht discusses both the Geschäftsverlauf (course of business) and the Lage (financial position) with sufficient depth and balance.

checklist.disclosure_item: Have the most important financial performance indicators (Kennzahlen) been included in the Lagebericht and explained with reference to the annual accounts?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that key financial KPIs (e.g. revenue, EBIT, equity ratio) are presented and cross-referenced to the Bilanz and GuV figures.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the Lagebericht assessed and explained the likely future development (voraussichtliche Entwicklung) of the entity, including material opportunities and risks?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check that the Lagebericht includes a forward-looking section discussing the entity's expected development with identification of material opportunities and risks.

checklist.disclosure_item: Have the underlying assumptions (Prämissen) for forward-looking statements in the Lagebericht been disclosed?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Lagebericht identifies and explains the key assumptions and estimation bases underlying any forecasts or projections.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the Lagebericht addressed the objectives and methods of risk management (Risikomanagementsystem) per § 289 Abs. 2 Nr. 1a HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check that the Lagebericht describes the entity's risk management objectives, instruments, and methods used to manage financial risks.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the Lagebericht addressed price-change risks, default risks, and liquidity risks related to financial instruments per § 289 Abs. 2 Nr. 1b HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if financial instruments are material to the entity
checklist.completeness_prompt: Determine whether the entity holds material financial instruments; if so, verify that price-change, credit/default, and liquidity risks are discussed.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the Lagebericht addressed research and development activities per § 289 Abs. 2 Nr. 2 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if the entity conducts research and development activities
checklist.completeness_prompt: Determine whether the entity engages in R&D; if so, verify that the Lagebericht describes the nature, scope, and objectives of R&D activities.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the Lagebericht disclosed the existence and locations of branches (Zweigniederlassungen) per § 289 Abs. 2 Nr. 3 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if the entity operates branches (Zweigniederlassungen)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Determine whether the entity has branches; if so, verify that their locations and relevant details are disclosed in the Lagebericht.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the Lagebericht cross-reference to disclosures in the Anhang where applicable (Verweis auf den Anhang)?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if § 160 Abs. 1 Nr. 2 AktG applies (not typically applicable to GmbH unless voluntarily elected or required by other provisions)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check whether any disclosure requirements are split between the Anhang and Lagebericht; if so, verify that appropriate cross-references exist.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the Lagebericht addressed the going concern assumption (Fortführung der Unternehmenstätigkeit) and any material doubts thereof?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Lagebericht confirms going concern or discloses any material uncertainties that cast doubt on the entity's ability to continue as a going concern.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the Lagebericht disclosed significant events occurring after the balance sheet date (Vorgänge von besonderer Bedeutung nach dem Schluss des Geschäftsjahres)?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check that any material post-balance-sheet events are discussed in the Lagebericht, including their expected impact on the entity's future performance.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the Lagebericht been prepared by the management body (Geschäftsführung) of the GmbH?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Lagebericht bears evidence of having been prepared and approved by the Geschäftsführung (e.g. signature, date, or declaration of responsibility).

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity confirmed or evidenced that the requirements of § 289 Abs. 3 HGB (non-financial indicators / CSR reporting) do not apply as it is a medium-sized GmbH?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the entity has either confirmed non-applicability of § 289 Abs. 3 HGB or that the Lagebericht contains no CSR/non-financial reporting section, consistent with medium-sized GmbH status.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity confirmed or evidenced that the requirements of § 289 Abs. 4 HGB (description of the internal control and risk management system in relation to the accounting process) do not apply as it is not capital-market-oriented (§ 264d HGB)?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that no IKS/Risikomanagement description per § 289 Abs. 4 HGB is required or present, as the entity is not capital-market-oriented.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the accounting and valuation methods (Bilanzierungs- und Bewertungsmethoden) applied in the preparation of the financial statements per § 284 Abs. 2 Nr. 1 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Anhang contains a narrative section describing all material accounting policies used for recognition and measurement of assets, liabilities, income, and expenses.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the currency translation methods used for foreign currency items per § 284 Abs. 2 Nr. 2 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if the entity has foreign currency receivables, payables, or transactions
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Anhang describes the methods used for translating foreign currency items (e.g. historical cost vs. closing rate) if applicable.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the application of the provision in § 284 Abs. 2 Nr. 3 HGB regarding the treatment of latent taxes (latente Steuern)?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if deferred tax positions have been recognised or waived
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Anhang explains the entity's policy on deferred taxes and the method used for calculating temporary differences.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the average number of employees during the financial year per § 285 Nr. 7 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Anhang states the average number of employees broken down by group if appropriate, or at least a total figure. (Note: this requirement also appears in the GuV section as GUV-015 from the P&L perspective.)

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the total remuneration of the managing directors (Geschaftsfuhrer) including pensions per § 285 Nr. 9a HGB, or has it invoked the § 286 Abs. 4 HGB protective clause?
checklist.trigger_condition: Always applicable for GmbH — the entity must either disclose or invoke the protective clause under § 286 Abs. 4 HGB
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Anhang either discloses the total remuneration of Geschaftsfuhrer per § 285 Nr. 9a or explicitly states that the protective clause of § 286 Abs. 4 has been applied.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed remuneration for former Geschaftsfuhrer including pensions per § 285 Nr. 9b HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if payments were made to former managing directors during the financial year
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify whether remuneration was paid to former managing directors; if so, confirm disclosure in the Anhang.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed loans granted to Geschaftsfuhrer (or Vorstandsmitglieder) per § 285 Nr. 9c HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if loans or advances were granted to managing directors during the financial year
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify whether the entity has granted loans to managing directors; if so, confirm disclosure of amount, interest rate, and terms in the Anhang.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the names of the Geschaftsfuhrer (or Vorstandsmitglieder) per § 285 Nr. 10 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Anhang lists the names of all managing directors who served during the financial year.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the names of Aufsichtsrat members (if any) per § 285 Nr. 10 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if the GmbH has an Aufsichtsrat (e.g. due to co-determination requirements)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify whether an Aufsichtsrat exists; if so, confirm that its members are listed in the Anhang.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the names and registered offices of undertakings in which it holds a participation (Beteiligungen) per § 285 Nr. 11 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if the entity holds participations in other companies
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Anhang lists all significant participations (name, registered office, share of capital) held by the entity.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the names and registered offices of its parent company (Mutterunternehmen) per § 285 Nr. 14 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if the entity is a subsidiary of another company
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify whether a parent undertaking exists; if so, confirm that its name and registered office are disclosed in the Anhang.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the ultimate parent (oberstes Mutterunternehmen) that prepares consolidated statements per § 285 Nr. 14a HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if the entity is part of a group whose ultimate parent prepares consolidated financial statements
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify whether the entity's ultimate parent prepares consolidated statements; if so, confirm that this is stated in the Anhang.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed a breakdown of provisions (Rueckstellungen) by type and nature per § 285 Nr. 12 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Anhang contains a breakdown of provisions by major type (e.g. pension, tax, other) with an explanation of each category.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the amortisation period and reason for the chosen period for any goodwill (Geschaeftswert) per § 285 Nr. 13 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if goodwill exists on the balance sheet
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Anhang discloses the carrying amount of goodwill, the amortisation method, and the expected useful life with justification for the chosen period.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed convertible bonds, participation rights (Genussrechte), or similar instruments per § 285 Nr. 15a HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if the entity has issued convertible bonds, Genussrechte, or other profit-participating instruments
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify whether convertible bonds or participation rights exist; if so, confirm that the Anhang discloses the number, type, and terms of such instruments.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed off-balance-sheet financial commitments (sonstige finanzielle Verpflichtungen) not shown in the balance sheet per § 285 Nr. 3 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if significant off-balance-sheet commitments exist (e.g. operating leases, purchase commitments)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Anhang discloses the nature and extent of significant financial commitments not recognised in the balance sheet, broken down by type where appropriate.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed commitments from operating lease agreements (Leasingverhaeltnisse) per § 285 Nr. 3a HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if the entity is a lessee or lessor under operating lease agreements
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Anhang discloses commitments from operating lease agreements with a breakdown by maturity period (up to 1 year, 1-5 years, over 5 years).

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed contingent liabilities (Haftungsverhaeltnisse) per § 268 Abs. 7 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if the entity has Buergschaften, Wechselbuergschaften, or other Haftungsverhaeltnisse
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Anhang discloses the nature and amount of all Haftungsverhaeltnisse and indicates any security provided.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed a breakdown of the auditor fees by category per §285 Nr. 17 HGB, or has it invoked the §288 Abs. 2 exemption for medium-sized entities?
checklist.trigger_condition: Does not apply if the medium-sized entity invokes §288 Abs. 2 HGB to omit auditor fee breakdown (must still report to WPK on request)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check the Anhang for the auditor fee breakdown (audit, other assurance, tax advisory, other services). If absent, verify whether the entity has invoked the §288 Abs. 2 exemption (medium GmbH may omit §285 Nr. 17 but must report to WPK on request).

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed financial instruments using fair value measurement methods per § 285 Nr. 18 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if the entity has measured financial instruments at fair value (e.g. derivatives held at fair value)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify whether financial instruments are measured at fair value; if so, confirm that the Anhang discloses the measurement method and fair value hierarchy level.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the fair value of derivative financial instruments per § 285 Nr. 19 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if derivative financial instruments (futures, options, swaps) are held
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify whether the entity holds derivative financial instruments; if so, confirm that their fair value is disclosed in the Anhang.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed unrealised gains and losses on derivative financial instruments per § 285 Nr. 20 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if the entity holds derivative financial instruments
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Anhang discloses unrealised gains and losses on derivative instruments, indicating whether they have been recognised in profit or loss.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the Stammeinlage (registered capital contribution) and any additional Einlagen per § 42 GmbHG?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Anhang discloses the registered share capital (Stammeinlage) and any additional capital contributions made by shareholders.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity invoked the protective clause (Schutzklausel) of § 286 Abs. 4 HGB to withhold disclosure of managing director remuneration, and if so, has it stated this clearly in the Anhang?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if the entity chooses not to disclose managing director remuneration
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Anhang explicitly states when the protective clause of § 286 Abs. 4 has been applied; confirm that no remuneration details are inadvertently disclosed.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity provided a breakdown of balance sheet line items per §266 Abs. 2 HGB (Aktiva) and §266 Abs. 3 HGB (Passiva)?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if the entity has waived disclosure under § 286 Abs. 2 or Abs. 3
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify whether the entity has applied any disclosure waivers under § 286; if so, confirm that the Anhang states the waiver and the reason.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the application of BilMoG transitional provisions (Art. 67 Abs. 3-5 EGHGB) where applicable?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if the entity still applies BilMoG transition rules for goodwill or pension provisions
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify whether the entity applies BilMoG transitional provisions (especially for goodwill per Art. 67 Abs. 3 EGHGB); if so, confirm that this is disclosed in the Anhang.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity confirmed that it has NOT applied the small-entity size exemptions under § 288 Abs. 1 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Anhang does not claim small-entity size exemptions under § 288 Abs. 1 HGB, confirming full compliance with all medium-GmbH disclosure requirements.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the treatment of aktive latente Steuern (deferred tax assets) and the reasons for any waiver of recognition per § 274 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if the entity has made a policy choice regarding deferred tax recognition
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify whether deferred tax assets/liabilities are recognised; if waived, confirm that the Anhang explains the entity's policy on deferred tax recognition.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the amounts of Forderungen and Verbindlichkeiten broken down by residual maturity per § 285 Nr. 1a and Nr. 2 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Anhang presents a maturity analysis of receivables and/or payables showing amounts with a remaining term exceeding one year.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed whether it has capitalised development costs per §248 Abs. 2 HGB, and if so, the amounts and amortisation periods?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if the entity has capitalised internally generated intangible assets
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check whether the entity has capitalised development costs under §248 Abs. 2 HGB. If yes, verify that the Anhang discloses the amounts, amortisation methods, and useful lives per §285 Nr. 22.

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed any Verbindlichkeiten with Pfandrechten or aehnlichen Sicherungsrechten (pledged or similarly secured liabilities) per § 285 Nr. 1b HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if the entity has secured liabilities
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Anhang discloses the total amount of secured liabilities and describes the type and form of the security (e.g. real property mortgages, shares pledged).

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed Forderungen gegenueber Gesellschaftern (receivables from shareholders) per § 42 Abs. 3 GmbHG and § 268 Abs. 5 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Only if receivables from shareholders exist
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that any Forderungen gegenueber Gesellschaftern are disclosed in the Anhang with reference to § 42 GmbHG repayment restrictions.
